---
title: "The Story of David and Jonathan: A Sunday Book By G. F. L., author of The Missing Sovereign, etc."
---

## The Story of David and Jonathan: A Sunday Book By G. F. L., author of The Missing Sovereign, etc.

**Author:** G. F. L.
**Date:** 1865
**Imprint:** London: Hatchard

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
